name: SuperOkay
description:
What SuperOkay does

SuperOkay is a free white label client portal tool that helps agencies centralize their task management. As a one-stop platform, it helps agencies manage operations in various departments on the same platform. 

Furthermore, the customizable interface lets you craft a dashboard that suit your agency’s project management needs.

Source: SuperOkay

Key features 

  • Project status updates to keep your clients in the know of a project.
  • Centralized hub for sharing information and data with clients and team members.
  • Control what your client sees with the privacy control feature.
  • Integrate your other project and client management apps.
  • Make your website more interactive with interactive documents, and other visually appealing aesthetics.

Benefits of Using SuperOkay 

  • It enhances productivity and efficiency of the team.
  • It helps improve your quality of services delivery.
  • Its interactive features help in engaging and converting a prospect on your agency's website.
  • It creates transparency between your agency and clients. This helps in building trust and solidifying your client relationships.
  • It can be integrated with other project and client management software for a continuous flow of work.
  • It facilitates suggestions, approval, and changes, speeding up the work process.
  • It accentuates the professionalism of an agency with customization features like;some text
    • Brand logos and colors
    • Customizable login pages
    • Quick links to the project launchpad.
    • Chat features
    • Team bios

Pricing 

There are four plans depending on the size of your brand and its needs. They include:

  • Free plan at $0/month
  • Solo plan at $9/month
  • Solo+ plan at $29/month
  • Business plan at $112/month

Pros

✅Creative items are easily reusable 

✅Highly scalable 

✅Adequate free options 

✅Pre-built templates are available 

Cons

🚫Steep learning curve for some individuals.

🚫The free plan is highly limited to a few options.

🚫Higher plans may be expensive. 

🚫Pre-built templates may not be appropriate for the brand
